docs.intended_use: Detect fraudulent payment patterns in real time on the consumer checkout flow.
docs.foreseeable_misuse: May misclassify legitimate transactions from customers in protected classes, leading to financial harm.
docs.affected_populations: Consumer payments customers, approximately 12M monthly active users globally.

docs.intended_use: Flag inbound user messages with high spam probability for downstream moderation review.
docs.foreseeable_misuse: May over-block legitimate user expression, especially in non-English languages.
